text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 77 

GAP_DAYS_OONP_OS 

LABEL: Gap Out-of-Network Pharmacy — days in other days’ supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in an "other" day’s supply of the drugs (other than 1- or 3- 
months) on this tier, when using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the coverage gap phase 
of the Part D benefit. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: GAP_DAYS_OONP_OS 

TYPE: NUM
